ddt:Target.Name: N_P42Q_P_IVI31_UDS_VC_20201103
ddt:Target.Description:
[5]Nov 3rd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified FunctionAddress.
[4]Oct 14th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Solved DB checker's error based on V1.10.
[3]Mar 3rd, 2020 XX6 Nissan Added BitPosition from CF items.
[2]Feb 27th, 2020 XX6 Nissan Removed BitPosition from CF items.
[1]Nov 18th, 2019 XX6 Nissan Replaced Config data.
[N] Oct 9th, 2019 XX6 Nissan Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[U200A]lost communication with V-DIST (RSE) on multimedia CAN
[U2025]lost communication with AMP on V1 CAN *TBD
[U2141]lost communication with Automatic Transmisssion on Powertrain CAN
[U2148](TBD)lost communication with Electronic Stability Control on IC CAN
[U2152]lost communication with Advanced driver assistance system
[U2159]lost communication with Electric Powered Steering on V1 CAN
[U216E]lost communication with Blind Spot Warning Right
[U2173]lost communication with Head Up Display on multimedia CAN
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)
